context: Tests whether the agent writes complete Rails engine documentation including a gem README with installation/usage sections and inline YARD documentation for the engine's main public class.

checklist.name: README.md created
checklist.description: A README.md is produced at the repo root

checklist.name: Installation section
checklist.description: README has an Installation section showing how to add the gem to a Gemfile and run bundle install

checklist.name: Usage example with Calculator.call
checklist.description: README includes a code example showing ShippingRates::Calculator.call with the required params hash

checklist.name: Supported carriers listed
checklist.description: README lists the three supported carriers: ups, fedex, usps

checklist.name: Return shape documented
checklist.description: README documents the success and error return shapes: { success: true/false, response: { ... } }

checklist.name: YARD class-level doc
checklist.description: lib/shipping_rates/calculator.rb has a YARD class-level summary comment

checklist.name: YARD @param on self.call
checklist.description: self.call has a @param tag for the params argument

checklist.name: YARD @option tags
checklist.description: self.call or initialize has @option tags for :origin, :destination, :weight_oz, and :carrier

checklist.name: YARD @return on self.call
checklist.description: self.call has a @return [Hash] tag documenting the response shape

checklist.name: No logic changes
checklist.description: The calculator.rb implementation logic is unchanged — only YARD comments were added

checklist.name: Contributing section
checklist.description: README has a Contributing or Development section with at minimum a link to how to submit PRs

checklist.name: English only
checklist.description: All documentation text (README and YARD) is written in English
